Elon Musk April 2026 Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk's tweet volume**, with "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" leading activity; traders assign ~20-21% odds to the 1120-1159 tweet bin across related markets like "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (total volume over $20M).[2][3]

Tom Lee's Bitmine Immersion Technologies acquired 101,627 ETH last week, boosting holdings to nearly 5 million ETH (82% toward 5% of total supply), underscoring whale accumulation that could influence short-term sentiment and price floors around $2,200-$2,300.[2][5]
